decision_context: Gulei 2015-04-06 stage-1 xylene leak; Incident Commander choosing foam-vs-dry-chemical suppression

supporting_evidence.snippet_summary: Industry foam-suppression manual: xylene class II flammable, AFFF 3% at 6.5 L/min/m^2 suppresses pool fire within 4h
Sinopec refinery incident report 2014-Q3: identical xylene pool fire suppressed by foam in 5.2h, no escalation

contradicting_evidence.snippet_summary: On-scene fire chief radio log: wind shifted NE 35 degrees at 13:00Z; foam drift observed

applicability: xylene-class II petrochemical pool fire, on-shore, daytime, wind < 5 m/s
settlement_rule: if pool fire controlled within 6h with foam AND no escalation to tank farm then factor_confirmed=true else false

observed_outcome.label: refuted
observed_outcome.rationale: Wind shift at 13:00Z caused foam drift; pool fire escalated to tank farm at 14:30Z

decision_context: Gulei 2015-04-06: Logistics Officer reports only 40% of required AFFF stock on-site; cross-region replenishment ETA 8h

supporting_evidence.snippet_summary: On-site inventory log: 12 of 30 required AFFF drums present at 19:30Z
Zhangzhou emergency-mgmt dispatch log: nearest replenishment 240km away, delivery ETA 8h

missing_prerequisites.description: actual fire-area size in m^2 not yet measured

applicability: Gulei-class petrochemical event within 24h, similar stockpile policy era
settlement_rule: if observed AFFF consumption rate within +/-15% of pre-incident model then factor_confirmed=true else false

observed_outcome.label: confirmed
observed_outcome.rationale: Stock ran out at 22:00Z; replenishment arrived 03:30Z next day; pre-incident model under-estimated rate by 22%

decision_context: Gulei 2015-04-06 stage-2: Safety Officer deciding evacuation radius (3km vs 5km) given wind forecast NE 5-8 m/s

supporting_evidence.snippet_summary: EPA dispersion model AERMOD run: 3km radius sufficient for xylene vapor at observed wind
Local meteorological station: wind sustained 5-8 m/s from NE for next 6h

contradicting_evidence.snippet_summary: Tank-farm explosion at 14:30Z produced secondary xylene release of 3x initial estimate
Wind gust at 15:15Z reached 12 m/s, blowing vapor beyond 3km contour for 8 min

applicability: downwind vapor dispersion, day-time, stable atmospheric class D
settlement_rule: if observed max vapor concentration at 3km boundary <= 1000 ppm within 24h then branch_3km_sufficient=true else branch_5km_required=true

observed_outcome.label: refuted
observed_outcome.rationale: Max vapor concentration at 3km boundary reached 2800 ppm at 15:15Z; 5km evacuation was triggered

decision_context: Gulei 2015-04-06 stage-3: Communications Officer issuing public statement that escalation is contained; meanwhile tank-farm chain explosion in progress

supporting_evidence.snippet_summary: Public statement broadcast at 13:50Z: 'fire under control, no further escalation expected'

contradicting_evidence.snippet_summary: Tank-farm chain explosion at 14:30Z (40 min later) — direct falsification of containment claim
Satellite thermal imagery at 15:00Z: 3 active tank fires, area doubled

settlement_rule: if any subsequent escalation event within 1h of statement then claim_falsified=true else claim_holds=true

observed_outcome.label: confirmed
observed_outcome.rationale: Falsified within 40 min by tank-farm chain explosion

decision_context: Gulei 2015-04-06: State Council Safety Office directive ordering all PX plants nationwide to halt production pending inspection

supporting_evidence.snippet_summary: State Council Safety Office order doc 2015-04-07 14:00Z (gov.cn published)
Xinhua News Agency confirmation report same day 16:30Z

missing_prerequisites.description: local-level compliance audit at each PX plant not yet collected at directive time

settlement_rule: if official production-halt records show >= 80% of PX plants halted within 7 days then directive_effective=true

observed_outcome.label: confirmed
observed_outcome.rationale: Industry Ministry records confirm 14/15 PX plants halted within 7 days

decision_context: Gulei 2015-04-06: Environmental Officer assessing whether coastal/onshore wind reversal expected within 12h

supporting_evidence.snippet_summary: Coastal meteorology textbook: coastal seabreeze reversal typical 14:00-17:00 local
Xiamen weather station historical April data: 73% of days show reversal between 14:00-17:00

missing_prerequisites.description: actual seabreeze timing on 2015-04-06 not yet in evidence set

applicability: subtropical coastal sites, April, synoptic pressure gradient weak
settlement_rule: if observed wind direction reverses from NE to SW between 14:00-17:00 local on 2015-04-06 then factor_confirmed=true else false

observed_outcome.label: confirmed
observed_outcome.rationale: Wind reversal recorded at 14:45 local; factor holds

decision_context: Gulei 2015-04-06: Medical Officer citing a 2003 SARS-era quarantine protocol; protocol not updated since 2010

supporting_evidence.snippet_summary: SARS-era quarantine manual 2003, last revised 2010

contradicting_evidence.snippet_summary: 2014 Ebola response guideline supersedes SARS protocol for chemical-exposure scenarios

settlement_rule: if Medical Officer applies 2014 protocol then factor_stale_demoted=true

observed_outcome.label: confirmed
observed_outcome.rationale: Medical team applied 2014 protocol; 2003 precedent marked stale in retrospective review

decision_context: Gulei 2015-04-06: Public Opinion Officer concerned about social-media amplification of incident imagery; no formal settlement source exists

supporting_evidence.snippet_summary: Weibo sentiment scrape at 19:00Z: 41% of top-50 trending topics incident-related

missing_prerequisites.description: no external settlement oracle for social-media impact

observed_outcome.label: unobserved
observed_outcome.rationale: No settlement source registered; tracked as un_settleable for M7 audit

decision_context: Gulei 2015-04-06 stage-3: Process Engineer choosing between continuous-cooling vs emergency-shutdown of adjacent xylene distillation column

supporting_evidence.snippet_summary: Distillation column thermal model: continuous cooling feasible if column temp <= 240 C
Plant SCADA snapshot at 14:15Z: column temp 198 C, holding steady

contradicting_evidence.snippet_summary: Tank-farm explosion at 14:30Z delivered 200 C thermal pulse to column; SCADA shows 245 C at 14:35Z

applicability: xylene distillation columns, similar thermal-mass class
settlement_rule: if column temp stays <= 240 C for 30 min after decision then branch_continuous_cooling_viable=true else branch_emergency_shutdown_required=true

observed_outcome.label: refuted
observed_outcome.rationale: Column temp reached 268 C by 14:50Z; emergency shutdown triggered at 14:55Z

decision_context: Gulei 2015-04-06: Transportation Officer halting highway traffic within 5km; ground-truth on actual traffic density not yet collected

supporting_evidence.snippet_summary: Highway patrol log at 12:30Z: 47 vehicles/hr counted on G15 highway within 5km radius

missing_prerequisites.description: no real-time traffic data feed at decision time; only manual patrol snapshots
downwind toxic-vapor threshold for highway closure not yet modeled

settlement_rule: if downstream retrospective finds evidence-ledger predicted closure unnecessary (traffic already low) then factor_marked_overcautious=true

observed_outcome.label: partial
observed_outcome.rationale: Closure was technically precautionary but caused 2 minor accidents from sudden detour; half-credit settlement

decision_context: Gulei 2015-04-06 stage-2: Incident Commander choosing evacuation radius at 19:30Z given xylene vapor cloud

supporting_evidence.snippet_summary: EPA AERMOD xylene vapor model: 3km downwind concentration 800 ppm at 19:30Z
Zhangzhou emergency planning zone: pre-mapped 3km radius for xylene facilities

contradicting_evidence.snippet_summary: Tank-farm explosion at 14:30Z vaporized additional xylene; 3km plume doubles

applicability: xylene vapor plume at 19:00-22:00 local time
settlement_rule: if max observed xylene concentration at 3km boundary within 24h <= 1000 ppm then factor_holds=true else 5km_required=true

observed_outcome.label: refuted
observed_outcome.rationale: Max 3km xylene reached 2700 ppm at 22:30Z; 5km evacuation triggered

decision_context: Gulei 2015-04-06 stage-2: Fire Chief choosing primary attack vector (east-side water curtain vs west-side foam)

supporting_evidence.snippet_summary: Wind direction at 19:55Z: 280 deg W; west-side approach downwind
Topographic map: west-side has 3m elevation ridge, east-side low-lying tank farm

contradicting_evidence.snippet_summary: Wind shift to 250 deg at 20:00Z reverses effective up/downwind assignment

applicability: petrochemical fire in coastal Fujian, wind 5-10 m/s
settlement_rule: if observed fire controlled on east-side within 2h then branch_east_viable=true

observed_outcome.label: refuted
observed_outcome.rationale: East-side approach aborted at 22:00Z due to vapor cloud; switched to west-side water curtain at 22:30Z

decision_context: Gulei 2015-04-06 stage-3: Process Engineer cooling adjacent xylene distillation column to prevent chain explosion

supporting_evidence.snippet_summary: Column thermal model: continuous cooling holds temp <= 240 C if flow rate > 50 m³/h
Plant SCADA 20:10Z: cooling pumps running at 65 m³/h, column temp 215 C

missing_prerequisites.description: thermal pulse magnitude from tank-farm explosion not yet characterized

applicability: xylene distillation columns, similar thermal-mass class
settlement_rule: if column temp stays <= 240 C for 30 min after 14:30Z then factor_holds=true

observed_outcome.label: refuted
observed_outcome.rationale: Column temp 268 C at 22:50Z; emergency shutdown triggered at 22:55Z

decision_context: Gulei 2015-04-06 stage-3: Public statement that tank-farm fire is isolated, broadcast at 20:30Z

supporting_evidence.snippet_summary: Public broadcast 20:30Z: 'tank-farm fire contained to single 5000 m³ tank'

contradicting_evidence.snippet_summary: Satellite thermal IR at 20:35Z: 3 active tank fires, area 3x initial estimate
Witness video (Weibo) at 20:40Z: 5 distinct fireballs visible

settlement_rule: if any escalation event within 1h of broadcast then claim_falsified=true

observed_outcome.label: confirmed
observed_outcome.rationale: Tank-farm chain explosion at 21:30Z; statement falsified within 1h

decision_context: Gulei 2015-04-06 stage-4: Environmental Officer assessing fire-water runoff containment

supporting_evidence.snippet_summary: On-site retention pond capacity: 8000 m³, current fill 1200 m³
Pumping capacity: 200 m³/h to wastewater treatment

contradicting_evidence.snippet_summary: Containment pond overflow at 04:00Z (24h after incident); 3000 m³ fire-water discharged to sea

applicability: Gulei-class petrochemical event with on-site retention pond
settlement_rule: if retention pond holds all fire-water for 24h then factor_holds=true else false

observed_outcome.label: refuted
observed_outcome.rationale: Pond overflow at 04:00Z with 3000 m³ discharge to coastal waters

decision_context: Gulei 2015-04-06: Medical Officer deciding triage protocol (START vs SALT)

supporting_evidence.snippet_summary: National Health Commission 2013 guideline endorses START for chemical incidents
Zhangzhou CDC 2014 tabletop drill: SALT performed 12% faster than START on simulated chemical mass-casualty

missing_prerequisites.description: patient count and injury severity breakdown not yet aggregated at decision time

applicability: chemical-incident mass-casualty triage in Chinese context
settlement_rule: if final triage protocol applied = START then authority_followed=true

observed_outcome.label: confirmed
observed_outcome.rationale: Zhangzhou Medical Center records confirm START protocol applied to all 14 injured

decision_context: Gulei 2015-04-06: Environmental Officer choosing air-monitoring strategy (fixed stations vs mobile)

supporting_evidence.snippet_summary: Pre-mapped fixed stations at 3km radius: 4 stations with online analyzers
Available mobile units: 2 trucks with portable VOC monitors

contradicting_evidence.snippet_summary: Wind variability beyond 5km requires mobile coverage; fixed stations miss plume center

applicability: chemical vapor monitoring within 24h of incident
settlement_rule: if mobile unit detects plume center that fixed stations miss within 24h then branch_mobile_required=true

observed_outcome.label: confirmed
observed_outcome.rationale: Mobile Unit 2 detected plume center at 4.2km radius missed by all 4 fixed stations

decision_context: Gulei 2015-04-06: Safety Officer concern about secondary ignition source (welding work at adjacent unit)

supporting_evidence.snippet_summary: Plant log: scheduled welding maintenance at adjacent isobutylene unit 18:00-21:00Z
Vapor cloud could reach welding sparks within 800m at observed wind

missing_prerequisites.description: welding crew not on site to receive halt order at 19:10Z; supervisor-by-phone halt relies on availability check

applicability: petrochemical facilities with adjacent maintenance work during incident
settlement_rule: if welding was halted by 19:00Z then secondary_ignition_avoided=true

observed_outcome.label: confirmed
observed_outcome.rationale: Welding halted at 19:10Z by Safety Officer order; no secondary ignition occurred

decision_context: Gulei 2015-04-07 14:00Z: State Council Safety Office nationwide PX plant halt directive

supporting_evidence.snippet_summary: State Council Safety Office order 2015-04-07 (gov.cn)
Xinhua News confirmation 2015-04-07 16:30Z
PetroChina press release acknowledging halt directive

missing_prerequisites.description: compliance audit at all 15 PX plants within 7-day window not yet publicly aggregated

settlement_rule: if Industry Ministry records show >= 80% of PX plants halted within 7 days then directive_effective=true

observed_outcome.label: confirmed
observed_outcome.rationale: 14/15 PX plants halted within 7 days per Industry Ministry

decision_context: Gulei 2015-04-08: Fujian Environmental Protection Dept preliminary water-quality assessment

supporting_evidence.snippet_summary: Fujian EPB preliminary report: coastal water xylene 0.3 ppm within 1km (above Class II limit 0.5)
Marine monitoring buoy data 2015-04-08 06:00Z: VOC 0.28 ppm at 0.5km

missing_prerequisites.description: long-term marine sediment contamination not yet sampled

settlement_rule: if 30-day post-incident water quality <= Class II limits then factor_holds=true

observed_outcome.label: confirmed
observed_outcome.rationale: 30-day follow-up sampling shows coastal water back to Class II within 5km

decision_context: Gulei 2015-04-15: State Council investigation committee preliminary cause announcement

supporting_evidence.snippet_summary: Investigation committee prelim: '二甲苯装置操作失误' (xylene unit operator error)

contradicting_evidence.snippet_summary: Xinhua follow-up: independent safety experts cite equipment fatigue + maintenance delay as contributing
Final investigation report (May 2015) confirms multiple causes, not operator-only

settlement_rule: if final investigation contradicts preliminary operator-error claim then preliminary_falsified=true

observed_outcome.label: confirmed
observed_outcome.rationale: Final report May 2015 lists 4 contributing causes; operator-error-only is falsified

decision_context: Gulei 2015-06: Petrochemical safety standards revision AQ3036 → GB30871

China Petroleum and Chemical Industry Federation endorsement

missing_prerequisites.description: compliance audit at 14 PX plants post-revision not yet completed

decision_context: Gulei 2015-09: Gulei PX restart decision after 5-month safety overhaul

supporting_evidence.snippet_summary: Tenglong Aromatics safety overhaul completion report Sept 2015
Local government approval for restart, contingent on third-party safety audit

contradicting_evidence.snippet_summary: Local residents protest restart; restart delayed to 2015-11

settlement_rule: if restart occurs within 6 months of incident then branch_restart_within_window=true else delayed=true

observed_outcome.label: partial
observed_outcome.rationale: Restart occurred Nov 2015 (5 months post-incident, 2 months later than planned)

decision_context: Gulei 2016-04: SAWS one-year retrospective report on industry-wide safety improvements

supporting_evidence.snippet_summary: SAWS report: industry-wide incident rate down 23% vs 2014 baseline
Independent PetroChina safety review corroborates SAWS numbers

missing_prerequisites.description: Caojian industry-association data (independent 2015-2017 incident count) not yet publicly available

settlement_rule: if official industry-wide incident rate decreased >= 15% vs pre-Gulei baseline then improvement_real=true

observed_outcome.label: confirmed
observed_outcome.rationale: SAWS report confirms 23% decrease; corroborated by PetroChina

decision_context: Gulei 2015-04-06: Transportation Officer halting G15 highway traffic within 5km radius

missing_prerequisites.description: no real-time traffic data feed at decision time
downwind toxic-vapor threshold for highway closure not yet modeled

settlement_rule: if post-incident review finds closure unnecessary then factor_marked_overcautious=true

decision_context: Gulei 2015-04-06: Process Engineer concern about internal hydrogen sulfide level in distillation column

missing_prerequisites.description: no public settlement source for in-plant H2S measurements

observed_outcome.label: unobserved

decision_context: Gulei 2015-04-06: P12-judge-calibration M8 review finding 'blind judge scores higher than leaked judge' applied to emergency-response factor auditing

supporting_evidence.snippet_summary: P12 paper/review_round_1.md: R3+R4 reviewers note blind > leaked (paired n=10)
P12 calibration_metrics.md: mean_delta = -1.284, CI [-1.461, -1.078]

contradicting_evidence.snippet_summary: P12 partial-data caveat: paired n=10 too small for verdict (PIT-007 floor 30)

missing_prerequisites.description: P12 full 450-run data not yet collected; current finding is partial-data
missing_prerequisites.blocks: carrying finding to P1+P2 mainline paper

applicability: methodology carryover from P12 to P1+P2
settlement_rule: if P12 full 450-run confirms blind > leaked direction then carryover_validated=true

observed_outcome.label: unobserved

decision_context: Gulei 2015-04-08: P8 Brier settlement bridge test — does our factor predicted_p match Polymarket consensus?

supporting_evidence.snippet_summary: Our factor predicted_p (industry halt sustained 6 months): 0.72
Simulated Polymarket consensus (post-incident): 0.68

missing_prerequisites.description: no real Polymarket event for Gulei PX restart available; market_consensus is simulated baseline

applicability: methodology bridge test (not real Polymarket; simulated)
settlement_rule: if our predicted_p - market_consensus < 0.05 in absolute value then bridge_calibrated=true

observed_outcome.label: confirmed
observed_outcome.rationale: Industry halt sustained 6+ months; predicted_p - consensus = 0.04 < 0.05

decision_context: Gulei 2015-04-06 21:00Z: Fire Chief initially assumes incident is limited to xylene unit; misallocates foam

supporting_evidence.snippet_summary: Fire Chief radio log 21:00Z: 'focus on xylene unit, tank farm stable'

contradicting_evidence.snippet_summary: Plant SCADA 21:25Z: tank T-101 temperature alarm triggered; misallocation falsified

settlement_rule: if SCADA alarm fires within 30 min of claim then claim_falsified=true

observed_outcome.label: confirmed
observed_outcome.rationale: SCADA alarm at 21:25Z, 25 min after claim

decision_context: Gulei 2015-04-06 18:51Z: Initial xylene leak detection delay (operator vs sensor)

supporting_evidence.snippet_summary: Plant DCS log: xylene leak sensor alarm at 18:51Z
Operator on-shift acknowledged alarm at 18:56Z (5 min delay)

missing_prerequisites.description: industry standard for alarm-acknowledgement response time

settlement_rule: if operator alarm ack <= 60 sec then response_normal=true else delayed=true

observed_outcome.label: refuted
observed_outcome.rationale: Alarm ack at 18:56Z = 5 min, way over 60s standard
